description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, release, and deploy, defining global caches for .m2/repository/ and target/. In the test stage add a verify:jdk8 job that runs on the maven:3.6.3-jdk-11-openj9 image, excludes the master branch, and executes the command 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify'. In the build stage add a validate job that also uses the maven:3.6.3-jdk-11-openj9 image, caches the target directory with key $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME (push policy), and runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS install'. In the release stage add a build_docker_image job that runs on the docker:git image with the docker:dind service, runs only on the master branch, pulls the target cache, and executes 'ls -la', 'docker login -u $CI_DOCKER_U -p $CI_DOCKER_PW registry.gitlab.com', 'docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/adrian.kozlowski/ircbot:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .', and 'docker push registry.gitlab.com/adrian.kozlowski/ircbot:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME' to publish the image to the GitLab Container Registry. Also in the release stage add a deploy job that runs on the maven:3.6.3-jdk-11-openj9 image, runs only on master, and runs 'mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy' to deploy artifacts.
